title: Scheduled Power Maintenance
content: There will be a scheduled power outage for maintenance on Sunday, June 5th, from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Power backup will be active for emergency lights only. Please plan your work accordingly.

title: Pool & Gym Policy Update
content: The gym and pool timings have been revised. Gym: 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Pool: 6:00 AM to 11:00 AM, and 4:00 PM to 8:00 PM. Please ensure proper swimwear is worn.
